tools.name: xAmzTargetComAmazonawsCodestarConnectionsCodeStarConnections20191201CreateConnection.createConnection
tools.description: Creates a connection that can then be given to other AWS services like CodePipeline so that it can access third-party code repositories. The connection is in pending status until the third-party connection handshake is completed from the console.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComAmazonawsCodestarConnectionsCodeStarConnections20191201CreateHost.createHost
tools.description:
Creates a resource that represents the infrastructure where a third-party provider is installed. The host is used when you create connections to an installed third-party provider type, such as GitHub Enterprise Server. You create one host for all connections to that provider.

A host created through the CLI or the SDK is in `PENDING` status by default. You can make its status `AVAILABLE` by setting up the host in the console.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComAmazonawsCodestarConnectionsCodeStarConnections20191201DeleteHost.deleteHost
tools.description:
The host to be deleted. Before you delete a host, all connections associated to the host must be deleted.

A host cannot be deleted if it is in the VPC_CONFIG_INITIALIZING or VPC_CONFIG_DELETING state.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComAmazonawsCodestarConnectionsCodeStarConnections20191201GetConnection.getConnection
tools.description: Returns the connection ARN and details such as status, owner, and provider type.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComAmazonawsCodestarConnectionsCodeStarConnections20191201GetHost.getHost
tools.description: Returns the host ARN and details such as status, provider type, endpoint, and, if applicable, the VPC configuration.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComAmazonawsCodestarConnectionsCodeStarConnections20191201ListConnections.listConnections
tools.description: Lists the connections associated with your account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComAmazonawsCodestarConnectionsCodeStarConnections20191201ListHosts.listHosts
tools.description: Lists the hosts associated with your account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComAmazonawsCodestarConnectionsCodeStarConnections20191201ListTagsForResource.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Gets the set of key-value pairs (metadata) that are used to manage the resource.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComAmazonawsCodestarConnectionsCodeStarConnections20191201TagResource.tagResource
tools.description: Adds to or modifies the tags of the given resource. Tags are metadata that can be used to manage a resource.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComAmazonawsCodestarConnectionsCodeStarConnections20191201UntagResource.untagResource
tools.description: Removes tags from an AWS resource.

tools.name: xAmzTargetComAmazonawsCodestarConnectionsCodeStarConnections20191201UpdateHost.updateHost
tools.description: Updates a specified host with the provided configurations.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
